title: ETE Manifest
description: Schema for ete.json, the required manifest file in every ETE bundle. Declares the bundle version, producer, and which content sections are present.

ete_version.description: Semantic version of the ETE spec used to produce this bundle.

producer.description: Identity of the system that produced this bundle.

produced_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the bundle was exported.

contents.description: Which top-level sections are present in this bundle.
